info.name: CFTC Commitments of Traders (COT) SODA API

description.content:
OpenAPI description of the public Socrata Open Data API (SODA) endpoints that the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission exposes through its Public Reporting Environment at publicreporting.cftc.gov. These datasets publish weekly Commitments of Traders (COT) positions for futures and futures plus options, in Legacy, Disaggregated, and Traders in Financial Futures (TFF) report formats.

Contact Support:
 Name: CFTC Public Reporting
